labs.title: Lab 1: Getting Started
labs.description: Set up Bob, scan your workspace, initialize Agent.md, and generate a Data Dictionary.

labs.title: Lab 2: Technical Design Document
labs.description: Generate a comprehensive technical design document from your COBOL codebase with Mermaid diagrams.

labs.title: Lab 3: Impact Analysis
labs.description: Analyze the ripple effects of a field change across your entire mainframe application landscape.

labs.title: Lab 4: Refactoring & Service Extraction
labs.description: Identify business rules in monolithic COBOL programs, check dependencies, and extract business services for modernization.

labs.title: Lab 5: Spec-Driven Code Generation
labs.description: Use a program specification to generate a complete CICS COBOL program and verify it against requirements.

labs.title: Lab 6: UI Modernization
labs.description: Transform CICS green screen applications into modern web interfaces with REST APIs.
